title: Advanced HTML Forms Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential tags for organizing and validating HTML forms.

questions.question: Which tag should you use to group related inputs visually and semantically within a form?
What is the purpose of the <legend> tag within a <fieldset>?
options: It sets a default value for the group's inputs.
It provides a visible title for the group of elements.
It defines the validation logic for the group.
It includes a primary link for form submission.

questions.question: Which HTML5 attribute ensures that a user cannot submit a form without filling in a specific field?
The <datalist> element is used for which purpose?
options: To define a dropdown menu of options that cannot be changed.
To provide an autocomplete feature for an input tag.
To list the names of all files in a folder.
To store data in the browser's LocalStorage.

questions.question: If you are creating a form that allows for file uploads, which extra attribute must be added to the <form> tag?
